transcript_segments.text: 我们今天要检查新的库存系统。
transcript_segments.speaker: SPEAKER_01

transcript_segments.text: 订单同步失败，但付款记录还在。
transcript_segments.speaker: SPEAKER_02

transcript_segments.text: 先保留日志，然后通知技术团队。
transcript_segments.speaker: SPEAKER_01

dubbing_segments.speaker: SPEAKER_01
dubbing_segments.source_text: 我们今天要检查新的库存系统。
dubbing_segments.target_text: Hoy vamos a revisar el nuevo sistema de inventario.

dubbing_segments.speaker: SPEAKER_02
dubbing_segments.source_text: 订单同步失败，但付款记录还在。
dubbing_segments.target_text: La sincronización de pedidos falló, pero los registros de pago siguen ahí.

dubbing_segments.speaker: SPEAKER_01
dubbing_segments.source_text: 先保留日志，然后通知技术团队。
dubbing_segments.target_text: Primero conserva los logs y luego avisa al equipo técnico.

warnings: Offline demo only; no real transcription, TTS, diarization, or muxing was run.
Review translated dubbing for timing, rights, and voice consent before publishing.

handoff.task: Translate and dub a Chinese operations video into Spanish.
handoff.summary: Timestamped Mandarin transcript converted into a Spanish dubbing plan.
decisions: Keep timestamps stable for the first pass.
Assign one Spanish voice profile per detected speaker.
Write subtitles before generating or muxing audio.
next_steps: Run real transcription with Whisper or another provider.
Generate one TTS clip per DubbingSegment.
Mux final Spanish audio into the source video with ffmpeg.
